data.title: Scorpio Tankers Inc. to release Q2 2025 results on July 30 with a conference call at 9:00 AM EDT and 3:00 PM CEST.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Scorpio Tankers Inc. revealed their intention to release the earnings press release for the second quarter of 2025 on July 30, 2025. The company, listed as NYSE: STNG, will issue the report in the morning (Eastern Daylight Time) and hold a conference call at 9:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time and 3:00 PM Central European Summer Time on the same day.

data.title: Nokian Tyres announces key leadership changes effective September to boost strategic growth and commercial focus.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, at 1:30 p.m. EEST, Nokian Tyres plc in Nokia, Finland, made a Stock Exchange Release revealing significant leadership changes to enhance their commercial focus and strategic growth. These changes will be implemented starting September.

data.title: Prosafe SE announced a recapitalization plan involving USD 193 million into 321.6 million new shares and up to 17.9 million warrants.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, Prosafe SE made reference to a previous stock exchange announcement from April 24, 2025. The announcement detailed an agreement for a recapitalization plan, including the recapitalization of USD 193 million through the issuance of 321,635,718 new shares (referred to as the "New Shares"). Additionally, the plan involved offering up to 17,868,651 warrants (referred to as the "Warrants") to shareholders as of May 16, 2025, as listed in the Euronext Securities Oslo (VPS) on the record date of May 20, 2025. This plan is pending final approval from all lenders involved.

data.title: Eaton (NYSE: ETN) to announce Q2 2025 earnings on August 5, 2025, with conference call at 11 a.m. Eastern time.
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on NYSE with the ticker symbol ETN, is set to release its second quarter financial results on Tuesday, August 5, 2025, prior to the opening of the New York Stock Exchange. Following this release, at 11 a.m. Eastern time on the same day, the company will conduct a conference call to discuss these results with securities analysts and institutional investors. The conference call will also be available through a live webcast accessible via the Eaton Second Quarter 2025 Earnings portal.

data.title: Weekly recap of finance news: Zimmer Biomet acquires Monogram Technologies, S&P Global collaborates with Anthropic.
data.description: This week, major financial updates include Zimmer Biomet's purchase of Monogram Technologies and S&P Global's partnership with Anthropic. These significant moves were announced in New York on July 18, 2025. Numerous press releases were issued, showcasing the active business landscape. Among the notable numbers are Zimmer Biomet's acquisition amount for Monogram Technologies and the scope of S&P Global's collaboration with Anthropic. The market was abuzz with these developments, highlighting the dynamic nature of the finance sector and the strategic maneuvers being made by key players.

data.title: 2nd Television Festival of SCO Countries started in Xi'an on July 16, 2025, organized by National Radio and Television.
data.description: On July 16, 2025, the 2nd Television Festival of Shanghai Cooperation Organization Countries commenced in Xi'an, the capital of Northwest China's Shaanxi province. The event was organized by the National Radio and Television.

data.title: Sila Realty Trust to announce Q2 2025 earnings soon in Tampa, Florida.
data.description: Real estate investment firm Sila Realty Trust has disclosed the scheduled date for the release of their second-quarter earnings report in 2025. The company also announced plans for a conference call to discuss the financial results. The call will provide insights into the performance of the company during the specified period and allow analysts and investors to ask questions about the financial data. This event is crucial for stakeholders, as it will offer a comprehensive overview of Sila Realty Trust's financial health, strategies, and future outlook.

data.title: 3M Q2 2025: Sales $6.3B, EPS $1.34 (-38% YoY); Adjusted sales $6.2B, EPS $2.16 (+12% YoY), 2025 EPS guidance raised to $7.75-$8.00. CEO cites strong organic growth. Operating cash flow $(1.0)B, free cash flow $1.3B.
data.description: 3M reported their second-quarter 2025 results with GAAP sales of $6.3 billion, up 1.4% year over year (YoY), and an operating margin of 18.0%, down 230 basis points (bps). Earnings per share (EPS) were at $1.34, a decrease of 38% YoY. Adjusted sales were $6.2 billion with 1.5% organic growth YoY, and an adjusted operating margin of 24.5%, up 290 bps YoY. Adjusted EPS stood at $2.16, up 12% YoY. Operating cash flow was reported at $(1.0) billion, while adjusted free cash flow stood at $1.3 billion. The company increased its 2025 adjusted EPS guidance from $7.60 - $7.90 to $7.75 - $8.00, factoring in the impact of tariffs. CEO William Brown stated they achieved strong results with positive organic sales growth and double-digit EPS growth. The company's 3M eXcellence operating model is driving their strategic priorities and performance culture. This marks the third quarter in a row where all three business groups showed organic growth. Key numbers include GAAP EPS at $1.34 and adjusted EPS at $2.16.
